context: Tests whether the agent uses the modern fetchMessages API, respects the 100-per-call cap, paginates correctly with start, uses BigInt for timetoken math, and handles missing channel keys in the response.

checklist.name: Uses fetchMessages
checklist.description: Calls pubnub.fetchMessages (not the legacy pubnub.history) for retrieving stored messages

checklist.name: count <= 100
checklist.description: Every fetchMessages call passes count <= 100 (no single unbounded fetch with a larger count)

checklist.name: Paginates with start
checklist.description: iterateHistory and loadAllInRange use the start parameter, set to the oldest timetoken of the previous page, to walk backward through history

checklist.name: Stops on short page
checklist.description: Pagination terminates when a returned page has fewer items than the requested count (in addition to terminating on an empty page)

checklist.name: Reads result.channels[channel] safely
checklist.description: Accesses result.channels[channel] and falls back to an empty array when the key is missing or messages is undefined

checklist.name: Timetoken multiplier
checklist.description: timetoken/date conversion uses the correct multiplier: x10000000 for unix seconds or x10000 for milliseconds (i.e., handles PubNub's 100-nanosecond resolution)

checklist.name: BigInt for timetoken math
checklist.description: Uses BigInt for timetoken arithmetic or comparison (not raw Number) to avoid precision loss on 17-digit values

checklist.name: Timetokens as strings
checklist.description: Returns / passes timetokens as strings, not as Numbers, when calling fetchMessages or returning from the converter

checklist.name: Async generator yields messages
checklist.description: iterateHistory is implemented as an async generator (async function*) that yields one message at a time rather than returning an array

checklist.name: Bounded range fetch uses start and end
checklist.description: loadAllInRange passes both start and end to fetchMessages to bound the time range
